title: 5 Best Substack Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Compare top Substack alternatives like Beehiiv, ConvertKit, and MailerLite. Find the best email marketing platform for creators and newsletters.
h1: 5 Best Substack Alternatives for Email Marketing & Newsletters
intro: While Substack excels at monetizing newsletters through a revenue-share model, it may not be the best fit for all creators and businesses. Whether you need more advanced automation, better monetization tools, or a lower cost structure, several platforms offer compelling alternatives with unique strengths.
why_switch: Access to dedicated ad networks and referral programs for additional revenue streams beyond subscriptions
More powerful automation, segmentation, and analytics features for growing your audience
Lower pricing tiers and higher free subscriber limits for budget-conscious creators

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv combines newsletter hosting with an integrated ad network and referral program, allowing creators to monetize beyond paid subscriptions. With 2,500 free subscribers and exceptional 4.7 G2 and 4.4 Trustpilot ratings, it's purpose-built for newsletter growth.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit offers visual automation workflows and integrated commerce features, making it ideal for creators selling products alongside their newsletters. Its 30% recurring affiliate commission for 24 months also provides ongoing passive income potential.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite starts at just $9/month with 1,000 free subscribers and boasts exceptional 4.6 G2 and 4.5 Trustpilot ratings. It delivers professional features like drag-drop editing and automation at a fraction of Substack's competition.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing with a full CRM, lead scoring, and advanced automation capabilities. It's the best choice for businesses that need to track customer relationships alongside their email campaigns.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo's free tier allows up to 100,000 subscribers and includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat alongside email. It's unbeatable for businesses needing multi-channel communication without the cost of separate tools.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Substack?
faq.a: Beehiiv and MailerLite both offer exceptional free tiers—Beehiiv with 2,500 subscribers and MailerLite with 1,000—while maintaining powerful monetization features. If you need unlimited free subscribers, Brevo allows up to 100,000 subscribers on its free plan, though it focuses more on transactional email.

faq.q: What is the best Substack alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is ideal for small businesses, offering a low $9/month starting price with automation, landing pages, and audience segmentation. For businesses needing CRM integration, ActiveCampaign provides advanced lead scoring and contact management starting at $15/month.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Substack?
faq.a: Yes—MailerLite at $9/month and GetResponse at $19/month both cost less than ConvertKit ($29) and Beehiiv ($39). However, Substack's revenue-share model means you pay nothing upfront if you don't monetize, making it technically free for non-paying newsletters.
